comment: SHA-256 (truncated to 16 hex chars) of each rendered prompt template at the SENTINEL_RESUME placeholder + sentinel target context. Run npm test (lib/llm/__tests__/prompts.test.ts) — it asserts the live hashes equal these. M4 bumped v1 → v2: q4 (fit) gained target_role/target_company. If a template intentionally changes, regenerate via `node --experimental-strip-types -e "import('./lib/llm/prompts.ts').then(m => console.log(JSON.stringify(m.hashPromptTemplates(), null, 2)))"` AND bump the cache version in lib/llm/perceive.ts (apeds:v2 → apeds:v3) so stale cached completions don't pollute new prompts.
